name: AnalysisPartLoadingProperties
summary: The AnalysisPartLoadingProperties class contains information related to analysis part loading properties.

constructors.name: AnalysisPartLoadingProperties
constructors.summary: Initializes a new instance of the AnalysisPartLoadingProperties class

properties.name: LoadGenerationAutoCreateFixedSupports
properties.summary: Indicates whether fixed supports are automatically created.

properties.name: LoadGenerationGroupIdentifierFactors
properties.summary: The load generation group identifier factors.

properties.name: LoadGenerationPartNamesInclude
properties.summary: Indicates whether part names are included in the load generation.

properties.name: LoadGenerationSelfWeight
properties.summary: Indicates whether the selfweight load is generated.
